instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: A vulnerability was found in code-projects Admission Management System 1.0. It has been declared as critical. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the file index.php of the component Login. The manipulation of the argument u_id leads to sql injection. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.
output: A critical vulnerability is present in the Admission Management System 1.0, specifically in the login component of the file index.php. This issue stems from SQL injection via the 'u_id' parameter. The vulnerability can be exploited remotely, and details of the exploit have been publicly disclosed.
